en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid China Work-Related Injury Insurance Participation Certificate in the China Work-Related Injury Insurance Participation Certificate Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t
China Work-Related Injury Insurance Participation Certificate
Please enter the issue date of your China Work-Related Injury Insurance Participation Certificate.

To confirm your company’s compliance with **China’s statutory workers’ compensation (Work-Related Injury Insurance)** requirements, please upload your official **Work-Related Injury Insurance Participation Certificate** issued by your local Social Insurance Bureau.
**Examples of Acceptable Certificates** - Jiangsu Province – Social Insurance Rights Record Sheet (Participating Organization) - Beijing – Municipal Social Insurance Personal Rights Record (Employee Contribution Information by Organization)

Before uploading, please **redact any employee-level sensitive information**, such as employee names and identification numbers.
**How to Obtain Your Certificate** You can download your Social Insurance Participation Certificate from your local **Human Resources and Social Security (HRSS) Bureau** or **Tax Bureau online portal, for example**: - **Beijing**: Beijing Human Resources and Social Security Bureau - **Shanghai**: Shanghai Tax Bureau online system or your district Social Security Center. - **Guangzhou**: Guangzhou Municipal Tax Service platform. - **Other Cities**: Visit the equivalent HRSS or Tax Bureau portal for your city or district.

All compliant employers must provide proof of statutory contributions (including Work-Related Injury Insurance) through the **official government social insurance platform.** Holding only a **PICC or other insurer-issued certificate** is **not sufficient** to meet this requirement.
Please upload your China Work-Related Injury Insurance Participation Certificate.
